creator: nacho319+freebsdZilla@gmail.com
text: Actually, I've already done the work to do the port for the newer version of YAF.  But I was also working on porting super_mediator (http://tools.netsa.cert.org) with YAF at the same time - that's 95% done as well.  Both YAF and super_mediator require an updated libfixbuf.  Anyway, I have the stuff for a YAF update and I'll post that ASAP - with or without the super_mediator port file.
